channel.title: Banking Fluency for Bitcoin-Age Operators
channel.itunes:author: FRIDAY
channel.description: A structured daily course for understanding banks, credit unions, regulation, payments, lending, custody, and the institutional context for Bitcoin-age financial infrastructure.
channel.itunes:summary: A structured daily course for understanding banks, credit unions, regulation, payments, lending, custody, and the institutional context for Bitcoin-age financial infrastructure.

item.title: Day 006: Credit I Underwriting And Expected Repayment
item.description: Banking Fluency Day 006: Credit I Underwriting And Expected Repayment. A regulated-financial-institution fluency lesson for Bitcoin-age operators.
item.itunes:summary: Banking Fluency Day 006: Credit I Underwriting And Expected Repayment. A regulated-financial-institution fluency lesson for Bitcoin-age operators.

item.title: Day 005: Bank Earnings Iii Profitability Safety And Incentives
item.description: Banking Fluency Day 005: Bank Earnings Iii Profitability Safety And Incentives. A regulated-financial-institution fluency lesson for Bitcoin-age operators.
item.itunes:summary: Banking Fluency Day 005: Bank Earnings Iii Profitability Safety And Incentives. A regulated-financial-institution fluency lesson for Bitcoin-age operators.

item.title: Day 004: Bank Earnings Ii Fees Costs And Operating Leverage
item.description: Banking Fluency Day 004: Bank Earnings Ii Fees Costs And Operating Leverage. A regulated-financial-institution fluency lesson for Bitcoin-age operators.
item.itunes:summary: Banking Fluency Day 004: Bank Earnings Ii Fees Costs And Operating Leverage. A regulated-financial-institution fluency lesson for Bitcoin-age operators.

item.title: Day 003: Bank Earnings I Net Interest Income And Margin
item.description: Banking Fluency Day 003: Bank Earnings I Net Interest Income And Margin. A regulated-financial-institution fluency lesson for Bitcoin-age operators.
item.itunes:summary: Banking Fluency Day 003: Bank Earnings I Net Interest Income And Margin. A regulated-financial-institution fluency lesson for Bitcoin-age operators.

item.title: Day 002: Deposits Are Liabilities
item.description: Banking Fluency Day 002: Deposits Are Liabilities. A regulated-financial-institution fluency lesson for Bitcoin-age operators.
item.itunes:summary: Banking Fluency Day 002: Deposits Are Liabilities. A regulated-financial-institution fluency lesson for Bitcoin-age operators.

item.title: Day 001: What Is A Bank
item.description: Banking Fluency Day 001: What Is A Bank. A regulated-financial-institution fluency lesson for Bitcoin-age operators.
